text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 147 

SR_CORE_SFTY_3_CD 

LABEL: Core HRSN Safety 3: How Often Threatened 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) safety – how often is subject threatened 
with harm by anyone, including family and friends. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_SFTY_3_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 1 = Never 
2 = Rarely 
3 = Sometimes 
4 = Fairly
